sections.name: Title
sections.prompt: Create a catchy and professional title for this research summary.

sections.name: Abstract
sections.prompt: Summarize the key points and findings of the document in under 200 words.

sections.name: Introduction
sections.prompt: Outline the context and problem addressed in the research.

sections.name: Methodology
sections.prompt: Describe the approach and techniques used in the research if mentioned.

sections.name: Conclusion
sections.prompt: Synthesize the results and suggest potential future work.
